creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Brand new patch, _without_ DESTDIR support:

--- p0f.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN p0f.orig/Makefile p0f/Makefile
--- p0f.orig/Makefile	Sat Aug 19 21:45:01 2006
+++ p0f/Makefile	Sat Aug 19 21:45:44 2006
@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	p0f
-PORTVERSION=	2.0.6
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.7
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
-MASTER_SITES=	http://lcamtuf.coredump.cx/p0f/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://lcamtuf.coredump.cx/p0f/ \
+
http://www.mirrors.wiretapped.net/security/network-mapping/p0f/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	babak@farrokhi.net
diff -ruN p0f.orig/distinfo p0f/distinfo
--- p0f.orig/distinfo	Sat Aug 19 21:45:01 2006
+++ p0f/distinfo	Sat Aug 19 21:45:53 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (p0f-2.0.6.tgz) = d6333198027b90e05ccb3412d8f25d05
-SHA256 (p0f-2.0.6.tgz) =
95aaf7861475c76929a08aeb4b7dca3ee912a5405fbbb1e4b80b8cadc3600441
-SIZE (p0f-2.0.6.tgz) = 131668
+MD5 (p0f-2.0.7.tgz) = 55c222cfb72a0e323e11e9744bbb6ff9
+SHA256 (p0f-2.0.7.tgz) =
179d6ee928d353a18a1720cbccd146154d2f0e94f9ec017db838f45c1e8ddcc9
+SIZE (p0f-2.0.7.tgz) = 133069
--- p0f.patch ends here ---
